creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
I think I found it. We need patch_v2 and in the Makefile

     64 + .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
     65 + .if ${SSL_DEFAULT:Mlibressl*}
     66 + USES+=  localbase
     67 + .endif

    ....
    89 - .include <bsd.port.mk>
    89 + .include <bsd.port.post.mk>
